title: Role frontmatter
description: Structure of the YAML frontmatter expected at the top of every roles/*.md file. Never describes an LLM model: that's the binding's job, not the role's.

name.description: Role identifier, used as a key in bindings/*.yml files.

tools.description: List of tools this role is allowed to invoke.

output_format.description: Expected format of the output produced by this role.

stack.description: Tech stack targeted by this role. Optional block: omit entirely for roles not tied to a code stack (CTO, PM, QA).
